hero.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today brings a surge of energy and enthusiasm, allowing you to tackle tasks with vigor.
aries.love: A spark of passion can reignite your relationship; make time for a romantic date night.
aries.career: Seize new opportunities at work; your innovative ideas will catch the attention of superiors.

taurus.general: Stability and comfort are your focus today; enjoy the simple pleasures in life.
taurus.love: Open communication leads to deeper connections; express your feelings to your partner.
taurus.career: Steady progress in your work will bring rewards; stay patient and diligent.

gemini.general: Social interactions will brighten your day; make plans to connect with friends.
gemini.love: Flirtation is in the air; let your playful side shine with someone special.
gemini.career: Your adaptability will be your strong suit; tackle changes with a positive mindset.

cancer.general: Emotional insights will guide your decisions; trust your gut instincts today.
cancer.love: Nurturing your partner will strengthen your bond; small acts of kindness matter.
cancer.career: Creative solutions will arise at work; embrace collaboration for the best results.

leo.general: Your charisma is at an all-time high; use it to inspire and lead others.
leo.love: A thrilling surprise might be in store for you; keep your heart open.
leo.career: Set ambitious goals and take the lead; your confidence will attract support.

virgo.general: Detail-oriented focus will bring clarity to your tasks; make headway with organization.
virgo.love: Mutual respect is key in your relationship; listen carefully to your partner's needs.
virgo.career: Diligence in your work will pay off in the long run; keep up the good effort.

libra.general: Balance and harmony are essential; seek peace in your surroundings.
libra.love: Romantic gestures will lead to a memorable evening; plan something special.
libra.career: Teamwork will lead to success; collaborate for optimal results.

scorpio.general: Your intuition is heightened; trust your instincts when making decisions.
scorpio.love: Emotional depth will enhance your relationship; share your passions with your partner.
scorpio.career: Ambition fuels your progress; pursue your goals with determination.

sagittarius.general: Adventure beckons; consider spontaneous plans that excite you.
sagittarius.love: Openness to new experiences can strengthen your bond; explore new activities together.
sagittarius.career: Your innovative ideas will be recognized; don’t hesitate to share them.

capricorn.general: Hard work leads to satisfaction; keep pushing forward with your goals.
capricorn.love: Show your partner appreciation; little gestures can reignite the flame.
capricorn.career: Your disciplined approach will lead to progress; continue building your reputation.

aquarius.general: Creativity flows today; let it guide your decisions and interactions.
aquarius.love: Surprising your partner will spark joy; think of a thoughtful gesture.
aquarius.career: Collaboration will lead to innovation; engage with others for fresh ideas.

pisces.general: Dreamy thoughts may lead to inspiration; journal your ideas for future reference.
pisces.love: Romance is in the air; surprise your partner with a heartfelt gift.
pisces.career: Intuition guides your professional choices; trust your instincts.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
professional.author: C.S. Lewis

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Believe you can and you’re halfway there.
professional.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
motivation.author: Arthur Ashe

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

captions.text: Dreaming big starts with small steps.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Every day is a chance to better yourself.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Let your dreams be your wings.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change—technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: It is not too late to make a better world through technological innovation.
tech.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

fun.text: I don’t need an excuse to be lazy; today is a perfect reason.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Time flies like an arrow; fruit flies like a banana.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and it froze!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

faith.text: Faith is about trusting God when you have unanswered questions.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Have faith in the journey even when you do not understand it.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, you get what you ask for.
wisdom.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The fool doth think he is wise, but the wise man knows himself to be a fool.
wisdom.author: William Shakespeare
